notes: Soundboard material, bracing, bridge load, and body form require prototype tests.
Gauge, material, course count, pitch map, tension, and speaking length remain unmeasured.
Bridge geometry and coupling must be tested before fabrication use.
Arm material, pivot, mass, stiffness, and contact geometry require action coupon trials.
Tip hardness and shape must be measured against tremolo tone and string wear.
Spring style and rate remain open until rebound tests exist.
Travel, leverage, and player feel require ergonomic and mechanical tests.
Optional noise-control study; no damping target specified.
Needed before promoting tuning, tremolo, or action claims.
